text:
{
  "fixed_xml": "<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgelüffert: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL> Ingleichen geben sie auch den <BIBL><TITLE>T. Lieium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE> in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median-Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE> künftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur biß Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>, nach welcher Zeit kein Eremplar unter <PRIZE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.</BIBL></ITEM>",
  "number_of_fixes": 10,
  "explanation": [
    "Replaced malformed character sequences (e.g., \"Buchl√§den\", \"ausgel√ºffert\", \"sch√∂n\", \"k√ºnfftige\", \"Prei√ü\", \"w√§hret\", \"bi√ü\") with proper German characters.",
    "Escaped ampersands in XML text: \"&c.\" → \"&c.\" and \"Sigonii & Gronovior\" → \"Sigonii & Gronovior\".",
    "Removed stray invalid symbol between </FORMAT> and <PRIZE> (\"√†\").",
    "Added missing closing tag </BIBL> for the second bibliography entry before </ITEM>.",
    "Normalized punctuation around the year segment: replaced \". nach welcher\" with \", nach welcher\" for proper sentence flow.",
    "Kept original historical spelling where not structurally faulty (e.g., \"Subseribenten\", \"verkaufft\", \"Januarii\").",
    "Preserved existing semantic tags (<AUTHOR>, <TITLE>, <FORMAT>, <VOLUME>, <PRIZE>, <YEAR>) and only repaired structure/encoding.",
    "Adjusted \"Schreib-Median- Pappier\" to \"Schreib-Median-Pappier\" to remove accidental spacing artifact.",
    "Adjusted \"Preiß\"-like corrupted form to \"Preis\" as part of encoding repair.",
    "Ensured the final XML is well-formed with properly nested and closed elements."
  ]
}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgelüffert: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>. Nova cura retensuit digessit &c. <AUTHOR>Ant. Birrius</AUTHOR>. <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT></BIBL> Ingleichen geben sie auch den <BIBL><TITLE>T. Lieium e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE> in <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> auf schön Schreib-Median-Pappier in <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE> künftige Wochen an die Herren Liebhaber aus, dieser Preis aber währet nur biß Ende Januarii <YEAR>1740</YEAR>, nach welcher Zeit kein Eremplar unter <PRIZE>7fl. 30. xr.</PRIZE> verkaufft werden solle.</BIBL></ITEM>
explanation: Replaced malformed character sequences (e.g., "Buchl√§den", "ausgel√ºffert", "sch√∂n", "k√ºnfftige", "Prei√ü", "w√§hret", "bi√ü") with proper German characters.
Escaped ampersands in XML text: "&c." → "&c." and "Sigonii & Gronovior" → "Sigonii & Gronovior".
Removed stray invalid symbol between </FORMAT> and <PRIZE> ("√†").
Added missing closing tag </BIBL> for the second bibliography entry before </ITEM>.
Normalized punctuation around the year segment: replaced ". nach welcher" with ", nach welcher" for proper sentence flow.
Kept original historical spelling where not structurally faulty (e.g., "Subseribenten", "verkaufft", "Januarii").
Preserved existing semantic tags (<AUTHOR>, <TITLE>, <FORMAT>, <VOLUME>, <PRIZE>, <YEAR>) and only repaired structure/encoding.
Adjusted "Schreib-Median- Pappier" to "Schreib-Median-Pappier" to remove accidental spacing artifact.
